things.name: Freedom Square (Maidan Svobody)
things.description: One of Europe's largest city squares at 12 hectares, dominated by the Derzhprom constructivist building

things.name: Derzhprom (House of State Industry)
things.description: 1928 Soviet constructivist skyscraper complex - an icon of early socialist architecture

things.name: Kharkiv Gorky Park
things.description: Sprawling park with a famous mirror stream, cable car and amusement zone

things.name: Blagoveshchensky Cathedral
things.description: Stunning 19th-century Byzantine Revival cathedral with a striking turquoise and gold exterior

things.name: Art Museum (Kharkiv Museum of Fine Arts)
things.description: Ukraine's second largest art collection with European masters and Ukrainian art

things.name: Annunciation Cathedral
things.description: Kharkiv's architectural symbol - a vast Byzantine revival church visible from across the city

things.name: Historical Museum of Slobozhanshchyna
things.description: The history of the Kharkiv region from prehistoric times to the Soviet era

things.name: Kharkiv Metro
things.description: Soviet-era metro with impressive socialist-realist station architecture and artwork

things.name: City Garden
things.description: Tree-lined historic public garden with the Shevchenko monument at the heart of the old town

things.name: Feldman Ecopark
things.description: Wildlife park with lions, tigers, giraffes and other animals in natural enclosures
